form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.56) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 16 starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.56) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 16 starts. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: After failing to finish two starts back she came out and won easily by 4 lengths at Q Straight (16.37) beating Sweet Embrace in a Grade 5 on March 30. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (20.05) at this track over 352m. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing second at big odds over 390m at this track. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.14) when fourth over 352m at this track in a Grade 5. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Scored by one length last time (20.05) in a Mix over 350m at Grafton. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 352m at this track, beaten 15 lengths (20.74) behind Stained Aces in a Restricted WIN on April 8. Not up to this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Through the first turn was checked and dragged down.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 7 length seventh over 352m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 27 over 390m at this track behind Extra Voltage beaten 7 lengths (22.65) in a Grade 5. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.
